channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: CNN Panelists Clash Over Texas Senate Race Between James Talarico and Ken Paxton
item.description: A heated debate broke out on CNN between Democratic strategist Paul Begala and conservative commentator Scott Jennings over the political prospects of Texas State Representative James Talarico, who is...

item.title: Democrat Johnny Garcia Wins Texas Primary After GOP-Linked PAC Backed Opponent
item.description: Democratic candidate Johnny Garcia won the Democratic primary runoff for Texas’s 35th Congressional District, defeating Maureen Galindo in a race that drew national attention because of controversial ...

item.title: Humanitarian groups warn Ebola outbreak could surpass previous deadliest records amid regional instability
item.description: An ongoing Ebola outbreak in Central and East Africa has raised serious global concern after humanitarian organizations warned it could become the deadliest recorded outbreak if current conditions per...

item.title: Hobbyist Builds Real-World Version of Windows Space Cadet Pinball Table
item.description: A hobbyist known as CNCDan is undertaking an ambitious project to recreate Microsoft's classic “3D Pinball for Windows – Space Cadet” as a fully physical pinball machine. Inspired by the nostalgic com...

item.title: CNN Analysts Say Trump’s Endorsement of Ken Paxton Could Force Republicans to Spend Heavily in Texas Senate Race
item.description: CNN commentators and political analysts discussed the potential political and financial consequences of President Donald Trump’s endorsement of Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton in the Texas Republica...

item.title: Former Clients Accuse Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche of Malpractice, Forgery, and Excessive Legal Billing
item.description: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche is facing a malpractice lawsuit brought by former clients Adam and Daniel Kaplan, according to reports. The lawsuit alleges that Blanche, while working at the law ...

item.title: Ken Paxton defeats Sen. John Cornyn in Texas Republican primary runoff
item.description: Texas Republican Senator John Cornyn has lost his primary election in a closely watched and highly contentious runoff battle against state Attorney General Ken Paxton. The race, which had been tighten...

item.title: Pam Bondi Joins White House Science and Technology Advisory Council After Leaving Attorney General Post
item.description: Former Attorney General Pam Bondi is reportedly returning to the Trump administration after being removed from her previous position earlier in 2026. According to the report, Bondi will now serve on t...

item.title: Analyst warns U.S. involvement in Iran conflict may lead to strategic setback and long-term geopolitical consequences
item.description: The article discusses commentary from journalist Dan Rather, who warns that President Donald Trump could be facing a significant and potentially humiliating setback in the ongoing conflict in Iran. Ac...

item.title: Texas Republican voter says Trump endorsement pushed him to support John Cornyn over Ken Paxton
item.description: A Republican voter in Texas told CNN that President Donald Trump’s endorsement of Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton influenced him to vote instead for Senator John Cornyn in the state’s Republican Sen...

item.title: 1948 MG TC Special Roadster: A Classic Postwar British Roadster
item.description: The 1948 MG TC Special Roadster is presented as one of the most iconic and charming British sports cars of the immediate postwar era. Produced between 1945 and 1949, the MG TC played a key role in rev...

item.title: Analysts Discuss How Concerns About Trump's Health Could Affect His Public Image
item.description: A panel discussion on MSNBC's 'The Weeknight' focused on how President Donald Trump's recent health concerns and visible signs of aging may be affecting the political image he has cultivated for years...

item.title: Tanzania upgrades electricity network with new poles to reduce power outages
item.description: Tanzania has started a nationwide programme aimed at improving its electricity distribution system by replacing old and weak power infrastructure. The Tanzania Electric Supply Company (TANESCO) is lea...

item.title: Trump Administration Plans Ebola Quarantine and Treatment Program for Americans in Kenya
item.description: According to reporting cited from The New York Times, the Trump administration is preparing a plan to handle Americans exposed to the Ebola virus outside the United States by sending them to Kenya for...

item.title: Eleventh Circuit judge privately reprimanded over alleged workplace affair in chambers
item.description: A federal district judge under the Eleventh Circuit has reportedly received a private reprimand from a judicial conduct committee following allegations of inappropriate conduct involving an extramarit...

item.title: Critics dispute Stephen Miller's claims about food stamp eligibility and welfare verification
item.description: A controversy erupted online after White House Deputy Chief of Staff Stephen Miller made comments about welfare programs and food stamp eligibility during a public appearance on May 26, 2026. Miller c...

item.title: Iceland reconsiders EU exploratory talks amid concerns over U.S. security reliability and Arctic tensions
item.description: The article reports that Iceland is re-evaluating its long-standing approach to security and its relationship with the European Union following heightened concern over U.S. foreign policy signals unde...

item.title: Report Claims CBS Mornings Omitted Coverage of Colbert Finale Amid Internal Network Tensions
item.description: A recent report alleges that CBS’s morning program chose not to mention the final episode of “The Late Show With Stephen Colbert” during its broadcast the day after the show aired, despite the signifi...

item.title: Federal judge blocks Trump administration restrictions on academic speech at West Point
item.description: A federal court in New York has issued a ruling blocking enforcement of a Trump administration policy that restricted speech and academic content at the United States Military Academy at West Point. T...

item.title: USDA Plans Closure of Federal Bee Research Lab Amid Nationwide Pollinator Crisis
item.description: The U.S. Department of Agriculture plans to close the Beltsville Agricultural Research Center in Maryland, a historic federal facility that has served as the nation’s leading bee research and disease ...
